title: Meteor's Vanilla Refined
description: This is Meteor's Vanilla Refined, a polished modpack that enhances the vanilla aesthetic by adding quality of life features, beautiful visuals and much more!
body:
If you’re looking to refresh your Minecraft survival experience without sacrificing the vanilla feel, then Meteor's vanilla refined is the perfect modpack for you! This modpack is for anyone who loves the feel of the base game but wants some quality-of-life and better visuals without using shaders at all.

Meteor's Vanilla Refined adds beautiful visuals and better fog by adding extra nice particle effects, better clouds and biome dependent colormaps to make your game look good without shaders. It also comes with a lot of optimization mods which gives you increased fps even on low end devices. There's many quality of life features like better utility blocks, more mob heads and more user friendly UI improvements. MVR adds better animations and more mob variants as well as better terrain generation for all three dimensions! Our modpack includes better sounds and better first and third person animations to make you feel more immersed.
There is also a custom vanilla tweaks resource pack which comes from https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
